summary: A historically interesting but incomplete Denver show with modest audio quality.
review: The recording captures a fragment of the Mammoth Gardens (Fillmore Auditorium) performance in Denver and is noted for its place in local history. Reviewers find the tape neither complete nor especially well‑recorded, resulting in an overall middling impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; the show is incomplete and recording quality is described as sub‑par, leading to an average overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review notes that the recording is not great and the show is incomplete; no specific details on clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Incomplete performance; reviewers provide no detail on song flow or pacing.
